productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Ribbon Embroidery Red Clutch
description: Look your glamorous best with this spice art clutch, customised for the ethnic diva in you. Show off your ethno-western side with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable. Width: 25 cm Height: 12 cm Raw silk upper with lace flowers and embroidery on the front, and sequin and embroidery detailing along the opening Has a clasp button closure One zippered pocket on the inside Care Wipe surface with a dry clean cloth
